title: Language Translators
summary: 9618 — compilers, interpreters, assemblers, and when each is used.
learningObjectives: Explain advantages of each translator type.

simpleExplanation.title: Making code runnable
simpleExplanation.summary: High-level source must be translated to machine code. Compilers produce object code before running; interpreters execute line by line.
steps: Interpreter: translate and run each line.

sections.content: **Language translators** (5.2) pairs with **16.2 A Level translation**. Compare **speed, debugging, and distribution**.
